title: Botox & Dermal Fillers: Can They Make You Age Faster？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Botox & Dermal Fillers： Can They Make You Age Faster？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt

segments.text: can Botox cause you to age faster I actually had this on an inbox just yesterday people do spot that some people who've had a set of treatment to look a little bit older and the reason for this I believe is that is because of the disharmony created by basically treatments are a little bit off the shelf maybe not artistically designed and what they do is they sometimes create signs of aging one of the most interesting things about aging is you lose volume and there's a point at which you actually look more beautiful my personal opinion is that many women peak around their early 30s because they have this balance between volume loss and definition so they haven't lost the structure of their face but you can see the contours really beautifully and before that the some of the structures are hidden and you just don't see the you know the beautiful shape of the cheek or chin there's less of less defined jawline and all those sorts of things then improve and then they start to go the other way like once you have into your 40s you start to lose some of

the structure and be what you see starts to become disrupted so you see some of the anatomy underneath the skin the ligaments the muscles and the jaw line usually loses some of its shape you might do some of the position of your eyebrows this happens in the 40s and onwards and so it depends on the age so the reason that people sometimes look old if they've had a treatment if you take a 25 year old and you give her a bigger stronger jawline and stronger cheek cheekbones she can actually look older I've certainly seen I've even seen it on stage at a conference someone who was treated and they were given a cheap treatment and an exaggerated temple volume loss and they actually looked a little bit older than before they had the treatment even though the cheek was a beautiful shape it was highlighting the volume loss in other areas so if you add volume in one place you can sometimes highlight the deficiency in volume somewhere else and this is why and sometimes there's a disharmony caused by treatments that makes people look older even though you've actually added volume so it's very subtle but that's behind some of the complaints and the dermal fillers or Botox can make you
